Прямой: Wh-word + вспом. гл. + подл. + гл.
'Where is the toilet?' → Can you tell me where the toilet is?
'What does she want?' → Do you know what she wants?
'How did he get here?' → I don't know how he got here
'When will they arrive?' → Can you tell me when they will arrive?
'Why are you crying?' → Can I ask why you are crying?
